zh.lifeSummary: 當Roland de Carrick於1226年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾時，他的父親Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick24歲，母親Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick21歲。他和Matilda Levington至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1275年在英國蘇格蘭享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roland de Carrick于1226年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾时，他的父亲Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick24岁，母亲Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick21岁。他和Matilda Levington至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1275年在英国苏格兰享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Carrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and northern England): habitational name from Carrick, a steep and rocky district in Ayrshire, named in Old Welsh with carreg ‘rock’, borrowed into Gaelic as carraig.

History: The earliest bearers of the Scottish Carrick surname (see 1 above) were descendants of the 12th-century lords of Galloway who became earls of Carrick in the early 13th century. The earldom passed by marriage to the   Bruce   family in later in the 13th century and then to the crown with the succession of Robert Bruce, earl of Carrick, to the throne in 1306. Illegitimate descendants of the earliest earls, themselves noblemen, continued to use the Carrick surname.

variants.name: McCarrick
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Con Charraige ‘son of Cú Charraige’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the rock’.
Anglicized form of Mac Con Chathrach ‘son of Cú Chathrach’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the fort’.

variants.name: Corrick
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Carrick or Carrack, a habitational name probably from Castle Carrock (Cumbria), which is earlier recorded as Castel Carok. The placename derives from British castello- ‘castle, camp’ (a borrowing from Latin castellum ‘fort’) + a word related to Welsh caerog ‘fortified’.

variants.name: Karrick
meanings: Possibly also a shortened and altered form of Irish   McCarrick  . Compare   Carrick   2.
Americanized form of German Karrich: metonymic occupational name for a carter or cartwright, from Middle High German karrech ‘cart’, from Latin carruca. The surname Karrick is very rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Roland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + land ‘land, territory’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In Old French literature it is borne by a legendary Frankish hero, a vassal of Charlemagne, whose exploits are told in the Chanson de Roland. The subject of the poem is Roland's death at the Battle of Roncesvalles in the Pyrenees in 778 , while protecting the rearguard of the Frankish army on its retreat from Spain. Roland is depicted in literature and legend as headstrong and impulsive. His devoted friendship with the prudent Oliver is also legendary.

variants.name: Rowland
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roland  , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roland de Carrick was born in 1226, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick, was 21. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Matilda Levington. He died in 1275, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roland de Carrick est né en 1226, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Matilda Levington. Il est décédé en 1275, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roland de Carrick 1226 in Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick 24 und seine Mutter Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick 21. Er hatte mit Matilda Levington mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1275 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roland de Carrick è nato il nel 1226 nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Matilda Levington. Morì nel 1275, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roland de Carrickが1226年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrickは24歳，母Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrickは21歳であった。彼はMatilda Levingtonとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1275年にイギリススコットランドで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roland de Carrick(이)가 1226년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Matilda Levington(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1275년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roland de Carrick nasceu em 1226, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Matilda Levington. Ele faleceu em 1275, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roland de Carrick родился в 1226 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick, 21. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Matilda Levington. Он умер в 1275 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roland de Carrick nació en 1226, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Matilda Levington. Murió en 1275, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años.
